result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Connect to an RCON server

USAGE:
    racoon <host> [password] [OPTIONS] [COMMAND]

ARGUMENTS:
    <host>        The IP address or hostname of the server to connect to        
    [password]    The RCON password for the server. If not provided, you will be
                  prompted                                                      

OPTIONS:
                          DEFAULT                                               
    -h, --help                        Prints help information                   
    -v, --version                     Prints version information                
        --no-logo                     Suppress the logo display (the            
                                      $RACOON_NOLOGO environment variable is    
                                      also supported)                           
    -p, --port            27015       The remote port to connect to             
    -r, --retry           3           The # of retries to make when attempting  
                                      to connect                                
    -s, --save                        Save the credentials to the System's      
                                      Keyring                                   
    -t, --timeout         00:00:30    The timeout duration to use when          
                                      connecting and sending commands           
        --use-koraktor                Whether to use the Koraktor Method for    
                                      reading packets                           

COMMANDS:
    creds    Manage saved credentials

commands.payload:
DESCRIPTION:
Connect to an RCON server

USAGE:
    racoon <host> [password] [OPTIONS] [COMMAND]

ARGUMENTS:
    <host>        The IP address or hostname of the server to connect to        
    [password]    The RCON password for the server. If not provided, you will be
                  prompted                                                      

OPTIONS:
                          DEFAULT                                               
    -h, --help                        Prints help information                   
    -v, --version                     Prints version information                
        --no-logo                     Suppress the logo display (the            
                                      $RACOON_NOLOGO environment variable is    
                                      also supported)                           
    -p, --port            27015       The remote port to connect to             
    -r, --retry           3           The # of retries to make when attempting  
                                      to connect                                
    -s, --save                        Save the credentials to the System's      
                                      Keyring                                   
    -t, --timeout         00:00:30    The timeout duration to use when          
                                      connecting and sending commands           
        --use-koraktor                Whether to use the Koraktor Method for    
                                      reading packets                           

COMMANDS:
    creds    Manage saved credentials

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Manage saved credentials

USAGE:
    racoon creds [OPTIONS] [COMMAND]

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information

COMMANDS:
    clear            Clear all saved credentials
    list             List saved credentials     
    remove <host>    Remove a saved credential

commands.payload:
DESCRIPTION:
Manage saved credentials

USAGE:

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information

COMMANDS:
    clear            Clear all saved credentials
    list             List saved credentials     
    remove <host>    Remove a saved credential

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Clear all saved credentials

USAGE:
    racoon creds clear [OPTIONS]

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help       Prints help information                                    
        --no-logo    Suppress the logo display (the $RACOON_NOLOGO environment  
                     variable is also supported)                                
    -y, --confirm    Do not prompt for confirmation

                     variable is also supported)
